case_title: HECTOR UC PRESUEL VS. SALAMIN SALAMIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESUEL, HECTOR UC AS TO DEFENDANT SALAMIN, SILMA INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRESUEL, HECTOR UC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAMIN, SILMA INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY $5,536.55 PRINCIPAL, $234.56 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,996.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
